Html:
Why do changes in the Site.css not carry over to the web pages when THIS application runs ?  I changed the hover color but the left column flyover stays as red ?

e.g.  I made this change in Site.css

FROM:

#leftColumn a:hover
{
color: Red;
font-weight: bold;
font-style: italic;
text-decoration: none;
}

TO:

#leftColumn a:hover
{
color: blue;
}
Try clearing your cache and refreshing the page.

Thanks, that did the trick.  It also allowed me to change how AddReview editor looks by adding the following styles to hide the top and bottom toolbar:

.CustomEditorStyle
{
Border-Color:#0066FF;
Border-Style:solid;
Border-Width: thick;
}

.CustomEditorStyle .ajax__htmleditor_editor_toptoolbar {
           display:none;
}

.CustomEditorStyle .ajax__htmleditor_editor_bottomtoolbar {
    display:none;
}
